                                            INTERNATIONAL FOOTNOTE

Toronto Branch (covered under separate Canadian master policy KST-CA-25-011):
      333 Bay St, Toronto ON M5H 2R2       Building CAD $2,850,000   Contents CAD $1,050,000   BI CAD $300,000   CAD TIV $4,200,000

*** This line is provided for awareness only. The Toronto branch is NOT insured under this U.S. policy, is valued in Canadian dollars, and must not be included in the U.S. schedule total. A separate Canadian placement with Intact Insurance covers this location (policy KST-CA-25-011). ***

                                           SCHEDULE TOTAL (U.S.)
                                   Page 5 of 7

TOTAL INSURED VALUE (U.S. properties, USD, Locations 1-15): $92,400,000

---- page break ----
                                            GENERAL DISCLAIMERS
                                   Page 6 of 7

This Statement of Values has been compiled from information provided by Keystone REIT Holdings Trust and its property managers. Values represent replacement cost estimates and have not been independently appraised. No warranty of accuracy is made by Apex Global Risk Advisors or any of its affiliates. Distribution is restricted to underwriters participating in the XLC-CP-2025-MULTI-0412 placement and their respective retrocessionaires.

Blanket building and contents limit applies across all fifteen scheduled U.S. locations. Margin clause 115%. Flood excluded in FEMA Zones A, AE, VE and any declared special flood hazard area (affects Locations 5 and 12 — separate DIC placement referenced in broker correspondence). Earthquake is excluded at Locations 1 and 2 (California EQ placement syndicated separately).
